BRANCH.COMMENT: --- VE-1242 Extract all Members which are currently active ---
--- VE-1262 socialInteractionParticipantsRemaining getting populated with negative value if members were in DECLINED status. ---
--- If EffFrom date is in future then member will be considered active if the member status is INTEAM ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: Get the value of socialSize from BR table
